edges.note: Chart-specific color roles apply the general palette hierarchy.
Coral restriction narrows tertiary-accent usage within the overall hierarchy.
Orientation rule governs how approved gradients are applied in banner/masthead contexts.
Masthead gradient is a specific member of the approved gradient set with dedicated logo usage.
Safe pairs and gold text ban are grounded in the WCAG AA contrast minimums.
Fallback handles clients that ignore the absolute-positioning geometry.
Geometry details the exact placement math for the constructed box.
Mandatory badge shadow is part of the box treatment.
Locks the box/badge corner radii within the overall composition.
Both govern LISRAYA presentation; ALL CAPS applies to the LISRAYA® form.

Emphasis-device limit and bold budget together govern text emphasis discipline.
Both constrain which emphasis devices may be used and where.
